headline: Newmont (NEM) Back In Focus After Red Chris Funding As Undervalued View Holds
summary: Newmont (NEM) is back in focus after the Canadian government agreed to provide CA$500 million for the Red Chris Block Cave project, a copper and gold development that could extend the mine's operating life significantly. See our latest analysis for Newmont. The latest Red Chris funding news comes after a mixed period for Newmont, with the share price falling around 22% over the past 90 days, while the 1-year total shareholder return of about 60% points to stronger longer term momentum. If...
